w:r.w:t: This solution provides a systematic, high-efficiency, uniform and dust-free solution for the mixing of powders, granules and solid-liquid mixtures.

leverages its three main machine types—the double-cone drum mixer, the drum agitator and the double-screw ribbon mixer—to cover all mixing requirements, from small-batch laboratory applications to large-scale industrial production.The solution achieves a mixing uniformity (CV) of <5%, reduces mixing time by 30%–50%, and lowers energy consumption by 20%–40%, making it widely applicable in the food, pharmaceutical, chemical, and feed industries. Through modular design and customised configurations, it helps clients improve product consistency, reduce operational costs, and achieve clean production.
Electricity consumption per tonne reduced by 20%–40%
Fully enclosed structure throughout the process, with zero dust leakage
Uniform dispersion of trace components at a 1:10,000 ratio
Easy to clean when changing product types, eliminating cross-contamination
Capable of mixing powder-powder, powder-liquid and granule-granule
Optional heating, drying and spray-drying functions
Can be fitted with a PLC touchscreen and variable-frequency speed control
Heavier particles sink, lighter ones float
High proportion of fine particles, prone to agglomeration
Prone to sticking to walls and caking
Material accumulation in mixing dead zones
Ultrafine powders of traditional Chinese medicine
Inappropriate equipment selection; materials with significant differences in specific gravity are prone to separation
Inconsistent batch quality, leading to quality complaints
Limited production capacity and high energy consumption
Significant residual material in the discharge
Unsuitable structural design, material accumulation in dead corners
Cross-contamination during product changeovers, difficult to clean
Inadequate sealing, resulting in dust leakage during the mixing process
Failure to meet environmental standards, resulting in 3–5% raw material wastage
Vigorous agitation causing material to heat up
Degradation of heat-sensitive components, resulting in reduced product quality
Bearing dust leakage, motor overload, gearbox overload
Frequent shutdowns for maintenance, affecting production
Food: meal replacement powders, seasoning powders, infant rice cereals
Pharmaceuticals: Traditional Chinese medicine powders, excipients for Western medicines, granules
Food: Meal replacement powders, seasonings, sauces
Pharmaceuticals: Traditional Chinese medicine granules, powder blending
Building materials: dry-mix mortar, skim coat powder, insulation materials
Significant difference in specific gravity leading to segregation
Gravity diffusion mixing, no mechanical shearing, no segregation
Powerful convective shearing, uniform dispersion of trace components
Atomised spraying + tumbling mixing, uniform dispersion of liquids
Viscous powders tend to stick to the walls
Screw blades designed to scrape the walls, reducing material accumulation in dead corners
Gentle mixing, with optional jacket cooling
Grounding available across the entire range
Anti-static design, with optional anti-static coating
Mirror-polished, seamless design, easy to clean
From design and manufacturing to installation and commissioning, Dousha takes sole responsibility to ensure the system is perfectly integrated and operates efficiently.
Modular design allows for flexible expansion of capacity or the addition of functional modules as your business grows.

Client Requirements: Production of a blended nutritional meal replacement powder, requiring the thorough and uniform mixing of various whole grain and cereal powders with certain additives, in batches of 150kg.
The client has subsequently purchased five mixers for use with different formulations.

customised a high-capacity mixer for a food enterprise in Bozhou, Anhui. It can mix 150kg of meal replacement powder uniformly in 15 minutes, offering high efficiency and stability. The client has purchased a further five units to meet production demands for multiple formulations.
